message:
feat(rchd): add hot-reload support for daemon configuration

Implements live configuration reload without daemon restart:
- New reload module with file watching via notify crate
- Debounced config changes with configurable interval
- Validation before applying configuration changes
- ReloadConfig struct with workers_config_path, debounce_ms settings
- POST /reload endpoint for manual reload triggers
- Returns added/updated/removed worker counts

This enables dynamic worker pool management without service interruption,
useful for adding new remote workers or adjusting resource allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
